description_long: This house is part of a small urban streetscape, flanked by a driveway and a sidewalk, with a car and a truck parked nearby. The structure features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, a small porch area with greenery, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The roofline is primarily flat, with a slight gable section visible, and the building appears to have two stories with a clear separation between floors. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The house is constructed mainly from concrete or masonry, with glass for the windows and some metal or wood accents around the entryway.
description: A modern, two-story urban house with a flat and gabled roof, black and white exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a recessed entryway with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, porch with greenery, large windows, and the main street-facing facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, roofline, and the driveway with parked vehicles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, minimal window openings, and the flat roof section.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the roof structure, back windows, and the relationship to the street and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a small porch, greenery, and a modern door; no visible steps or columns.
